ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repository_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the topic is associated with */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_topics_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the issue is associated with */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the issue is currently open */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignee */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone */,
  "labels" TEXT /* JSON array of labels associated with the issue */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was closed (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the pull request is associated with */,
  "pr_title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "pr_description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the pull request was created */,
  "is_merged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pull request has been merged */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignee */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone */,
  "labels" TEXT /* JSON array of labels associated with the pull request */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was closed (if applicable) */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was merged (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pull request */,
  "merged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who merged the pull request (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_merged_by FOREIGN KEY ("merged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the contributor is associated with */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "contributions" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made by the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the contributor */,
  "last_contributed_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last contribution */,
  "total_commits" INTEGER /* Total number of commits made by the contributor */,
  "total_pull_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of pull requests made by the contributor */,
  "total_issues" INTEGER /* Total number of issues created by the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the comment is associated with */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "is_on_issue" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is on an issue (true) or a pull request (false) */,
  "commented_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue (if applicable) */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_commented_by FOREIGN KEY ("commented_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the guideline is associated with */,
  "guide_text" TEXT /* Text of the contributor guideline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_guidelines_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "codes_of_conduct" (
  "conduct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code of conduct entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the code of conduct is associated with */,
  "conduct_text" TEXT /* Text of the code of conduct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conduct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_codes_of_conduct_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the license is associated with */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Text describing the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_licenses_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* GitHub username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicate if the user is an admin */,
  "is_maintainer" INTEGER /* Indicate if the user is a maintainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, maintainer, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the milestone */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the milestone (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Tag name of the release */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was published */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Indicate if the release is a draft */,
  "is_prerelease" INTEGER /* Indicate if the release is a pre-release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA of the commit the tag points to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
